text:
M1730 Depression Screening This field indicates if the patient has been screened for depression using a standardized screening tool. 00 = No
01 = Yes, patient was screened using the PHQ-2? scale. (Instructions for this two-question tool: Ask patient: "Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems")
02 = Yes, with a different standardized assessment-and the patient meets
criteria for further evaluation for depression.
03 = Yes, patient was screened
